metadata.title: Alejandra Marulanda — Telematics & Systems Engineer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Alejandra Marulanda, Telematics and Computer Systems engineer focused on telecommunications, IoT, wireless networks and cybersecurity. Mexico City.

hero.name: Alejandra Marulanda
hero.tagline: I design and build solutions where networks, software and hardware meet: telecommunications, IoT and distributed systems applied to space-analog and environmental projects.

home.ctaBody: I'm available to collaborate on telecommunications, IoT and development.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Professional profile
about.body1: I'm a senior Telematics Engineering student (UPIITA-IPN) with a second degree in Computer Systems Engineering (Universidad ICEL). My focus is on telecommunications, IoT and distributed systems, with hands-on experience in wireless networks, antenna design and IoT architectures applied to space-analog and environmental projects.
about.body2: I'm interested in advancing in communications, cybersecurity and network infrastructure, combining theory and hands-on implementation to build efficient and reliable solutions.

networks.title: Networks & Telecommunications
items: IoT: ESP32, Raspberry Pi, MQTT, ESP-NOW

points: Collaborated in the conceptual and logical design of a database for inventory management.
Contributed to technical documentation, including conference transcription and English–Spanish translation.
Customized and adapted Forms.app to meet the company's operational requirements.
Collaborated with administrative and technical teams to improve data collection and process efficiency.
Documented procedures and provided user support to ensure successful tool adoption.

antenna.title: Antenna Design & Wireless Monitoring
points: Applied transmission line and antenna theory (gain, impedance matching, operating frequency, radiation patterns) to design and prototype 2.4 GHz WiFi antennas (biquad and cloverleaf).
Fabricated and tested antenna prototypes for a wireless water-quality monitoring system deployed in the Xochimilco lake area.
Characterized performance using a Vector Network Analyzer (VNA) and spectrum analyzer to evaluate return loss, bandwidth and overall link performance.

iot.title: Distributed IoT Network for Analog Space Habitats
points: Design and simulation of a distributed IoT network for monitoring and automatic control in analog space habitats.
Development of a distributed IoT system using ESP32, Raspberry Pi, WiFi, MQTT and ESP-NOW.
Implementation of low-latency, fault-tolerant data links for sensor networks in constrained environments.
Development of network topology, routing and control strategies for reliable real-time monitoring.

thesis.title: Thesis: Basic Cybersecurity in Mexico City
points: Developing a technical guide in accessible language to help users with limited digital literacy understand and prevent common cyber attacks in Mexico.
Focused on practical strategies against threats such as phishing, malware, SIM swapping and social engineering.
Aims to reduce user vulnerability and promote safer digital practices through clear, easy-to-follow guidance.

education.title: Education

certifications: Introduction to Web Development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript — IBM, 2023
Microsoft Office Suite proficiency — Testing Program, 2018

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.body: I'm open to opportunities in telecommunications, networking, IoT and cybersecurity. Reach out and let's talk.
